name: Frozen Pineapple-Almond Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Coarsely chop almonds and set aside.
2. Drain pineapple and reserve syrup.
3. Cut drained cherries into quarters and set aside.
4. Cut dates (about 3 ounces) into slivers and set aside.
5. Cut marshmallows into eighths and set aside.
6. Combine 3 tablespoons of pineapple syrup with softened cream cheese in a bowl. Beat until fluffy, then blend in mayonnaise. Gently fold in pineapple, cherries, dates, almonds, and marshmallows.
7. Chill the bowl and beaters, then whip the whipping cream until it peaks softly. Gently fold the whipped cream into the fruit mixture.
8. Turn the mixture into a mold and freeze until firm, about 3-4 hours.
